{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322070745BDD8B991226D6D6BE10F\"}"},"total":5257},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7104209234853839652","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这才是修仙嘛，弱肉强食为了变强不择手段，人不为己天诛地灭更何况是修仙，而且主角不舔，杀戮果断，强👍推荐，希望后面作者不要水文，让评分一直在9点多，总的来说这本小说挺好看的，唯一一点就是更新慢了，一天不到就看完了","text_exts":[{"e":19,"s":15,"text":"不择手段","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E4%B8%8D%E6%8B%A9%E6%89%8B%E6%AE%B5\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741344656D6BE10F%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227104209234853839652%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227070059082350070816%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%8D%E6%8B%A9%E6%89%8B%E6%AE%B5%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1654077702,"group_id":"7070059082350070816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8EvPwbTJ7Rh1gkUk6ivy8c=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d1cab33b9da74f7482aeeff4e48c6e0b~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776703250\u0026x-signature=G5fq4j2ieLzLOAkP4PQ0LLUeiAM%3D","user_id":"465840560429966","user_name":"陆尘·"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"465840560429966","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7070059082350070816","book_info":{"abst umb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/55aafd32edbfa0efb21a6350d0c3d300~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779318465\u0026x-signature=tivM%2FdMFcJUDbPUfXWVzmbTcf4g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2493341594288307","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.4598787e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260322070745BDD8B991226D6D6BE10F\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":58,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":24598,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":68404},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1654094569,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7079365048078336771","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，今天一下午把它看完了。传统修仙主角不会心慈手软，搞一些圣母情节。就是更新的太少了。还有作者的另一本书葵花宝典的，本来也挺好看，但是断了总是太监。如果这本书还太监，我又会给你差评。","text_exts":[{"e":57,"s":53,"text":"葵花宝典","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E8%91%B5%E8%8A%B1%E5%AE%9D%E5%85%B8\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741344656D6BE10F%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227079365048078336771%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227070059082350070816%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%91%B5%E8%8A%B1%E5%AE%9D%E5%85%B8%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1648293124,"group_id":"7070059082350070816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"众里寻他千百度。蓦然回首那人却在灯火阑珊处（最近在登小号）☬","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/Qy95TpshKu+Dy8rclj8Po=","gender":1,"is_c ,"text":"整本书看下来，作者文学底蕴上佳，剧情不落俗套，男主生性冷淡了些却是格外契合仙路，做事老练，自百章来无一处毒点。作者以此为基，哪怕平地踏步，也不失为一本顶流作品。还望君多多努力，我等也能见证一本神作诞生。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1649170381,"group_id":"7070059082350070816","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8zvp9DpuuHp+nU5OtHFjfQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/67b7f54ad33a44b8bba762065a13d9f7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776707141\u0026x-signature=wt6BRszMYHqnRNT2Fx8eQd1Fq4Q%3D","user_id":"110850865802","user_name":"圣贤书"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"110850865802","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7070059082350070816","book_info":{"abstract":"【不圣母，无女主，无系统，无穿越。】心之所欲，意之所向，便为极道仙路，天道？天道已死，魔天当立，这是一个极其残酷的修仙世界，强者为尊，弱者为蚁，我叫赵无忌，为寻仙路，百无禁忌。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/e7a7e80df527d39ccf0784d239b4b9c1~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"泱泱大秦1","author_id":"","book_id":"7070059082350070816","book_name":"儒雅随和的我竟然是滔天魔头","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1140,\"name\":\"东方仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140\u0026name=东方仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":259,\"name\":\"奇幻仙侠\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259\u0026name=奇幻仙侠\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":9,\"name\":\"仙侠\",\"sc
